center.name: 苏迪曼山脉
center.summary: 苏迪曼山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Red-billed brushturkey、Baliem whistler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Baliem whistler is found in the Snow Mountains of Papua Province in Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Red-billed Brushturkey inhabits to lowland forests on Vogelkop Peninsula, western Snow Mountains, and Misool Island of West Papua

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Baliem whistler is found in the Snow Mountains of Papua Province in Indonesia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Red-billed Brushturkey inhabits to lowland forests on Vogelkop Peninsula, western Snow Mountains, and Misool Island of West Papua
